report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Solana Firedancer Validator Client Guide 2026 and Bitcoin Covenants & OP_CAT Guide 2026, both with full SEO, structured data, and data-driven rendering.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Solana Firedancer: Jump Crypto's independent validator client is live on mainnet with 20%+ of staked SOL. Full Firedancer launched late 2025 after Frankendancer hybrid. 1M+ TPS in controlled tests. Figment seeing 18-28 bps higher staking rewards. Tile-based C architecture designed for modern hardware.

Bitcoin OP_CAT (BIP-347): Originally in Bitcoin's first release, disabled in 2010. Concatenates byte strings enabling covenants when combined with CheckSig/Taproot. Not activated on mainnet yet. Competing proposals include OP_CTV (BIP-119), CSFS, LNHANCE. StarkWare built bridge covenant PoC. Active on Fractal Bitcoin for testing.

Both topics have strong search intent and no existing dedicated coverage on degen0x. Firedancer complements existing solana-alpenglow-guide. OP_CAT fills gap between bitcoin-layer-2-guide and btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Solana Firedancer Guide: 10 sections covering architecture (tile system), client diversity, Firedancer vs Agave comparison, migration status, staking reward impact, risks, and Alpenglow roadmap. ~3000 words with 5 data-driven arrays (architectureTiles, milestones, comparisonPoints).

Bitcoin Covenants OP_CAT Guide: 10 sections covering covenant mechanics, OP_CAT history, 4 proposal comparisons (OP_CAT/CTV/CSFS/LNHANCE), use cases (vaults, trustless bridges, recursive covenants), activation debate, risks. ~3000 words with 3 data-driven arrays (proposals, useCases, comparisonTableData).

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Firedancer: Title 'Solana Firedancer Validator Client Guide 2026: Performance, Architecture & Migration | degen0x'. Target keywords: solana firedancer, firedancer validator, solana client diversity, firedancer vs agave. Article + FAQ schemas. 6 FAQ items.

OP_CAT: Title 'Bitcoin Covenants & OP_CAT Guide 2026: BIP-347, Vaults, Trustless Bridges | degen0x'. Target keywords: bitcoin covenants, OP_CAT, BIP-347, bitcoin programmability, OP_CTV. Article + FAQ schemas. 6 FAQ items.
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts. OpenGraph + Twitter cards configured. Internal linking to 4-5 related articles each.
